## Project Overview

```{python}

if not context_loaded:
    missing_note = "Context file not found." if not context_file else f"Context file '{context_file}' not found."
    emit_markdown(f"::: {{.callout-warning}}\n{missing_note}\n:::\n")

project = context.get("project", {})
fields = [
    ("Project ID", project.get("id", "")),
    ("Batch ID", project.get("batch_id", "")),
    ("Project Title", project.get("title", "")),
    ("Lead", project.get("lead", "")),
    ("Contact", project.get("contact", "")),
    ("Acquisition Date", project.get("acquisition_date", "")),
    ("Matrix", project.get("matrix", "")),
    ("Organism", project.get("organism", "")),
    ("Report Generated", report_generated_at),
    ("Context Generated", context.get("generated_at", "")),
]

lines = ["| Field | Value |", "| --- | --- |"]
for label, value in fields:
    if value is None:
        value = ""
    value = str(value)
    value = value.replace("\n", "<br>")
    lines.append(f"| {label} | {value} |")

emit_markdown("\n".join(lines))

description = project.get("description") or context.get("project_description")
if description:
    emit_markdown(description)
else:
    emit_markdown("> TODO: Add a short project description to `project.description` in the context file.")

notes = project.get("notes")
if notes:
    note_block = "::: {.callout-note}\n" + notes + "\n:::\n"
    emit_markdown(note_block)
```
